data.title: Update project docs to reflect Figma REST API pull-back
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and relevant documentation to reflect the Figma REST API pull-back workflow, re-sync command, PAT configuration, and merge behavior.
**Why**: Ensures future agents and developers understand the pull-back capability.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md updates (re-sync command reference, design.figma_pat config key, merge behavior description), spatial-layout.json schema updates for designer_added/behavioral_spec_status fields
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents the re-sync command, PAT configuration, and merge behavior
- When this story is complete, spatial-layout.json schema reference is updated with designer_added and behavioral_spec_status field documentation

## Considerations

- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting, structure, and conventions
